ChangeRequest.name: Counterparty in scope of AnaCredit new attribute in EIL
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!--See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/bird-subgroups/bird-transformation-rules/-/blob/029a901266c49be92bc330a197fb0501e37e42a1/AnaCredit%20Subgroup/Derivation%20rules%20-%20In%20progress/Counterparty%20in%20scope%20of%20AnaCredit/infosheet.md)-->
### Overview
Due to AnaCredit regulation https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/PDF/?uri=CELEX:32016R0867 , ART.4.1.A the instrument has to be reported only if the debtor is a legal entity. In order to generate the AnaCredit output we need to filter on the legal entities, this new variable supports the generation.
### Contact person
@Silvia.Giacinti
### Description of change request
Add A new attribute "Counterparty in scope of AnaCredit" in EIL "BIRD_PRTY_EIL"
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
_\[to be define \]_
